title: Brauneria atrorubens

Classification of Brauneria atrorubens places it within the subfamily Epidendroideae.

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as combat infections.
